activities_projects.title: Timeline of British Expansion
activities_projects.objective: Understand key events in British expansion in India
steps: Read about important events in the chapter
List major events like the Battle of Plassey and Battle of Buxar
Arrange them in chronological order on a timeline
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the sequence of historical events
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of timeline and presentation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Map Activity – British Territories
activities_projects.objective: Identify regions controlled by the East India Company
steps: Locate Bengal, Madras, and Bombay on the map
Shade areas controlled by the East India Company
Label important places like Plassey and Buxar

activities_projects.title: Role Play – Nawab and Company
activities_projects.objective: Understand conflicts between Indian rulers and the Company
steps: Form small groups
Act out a scene between a Nawab and the East India Company officials
Discuss why conflicts happened
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand historical conflicts through interaction
activities_projects.evaluation: Participation and understanding of roles (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Important Personalities Chart
steps: Write names of figures like Robert Clive and Siraj-ud-Daulah
Write one or two points about each person
Decorate and present the chart

activities_projects.title: Cause and Effect Table
activities_projects.objective: Understand causes and results of historical events
steps: Choose events like the Battle of Plassey
Write the causes of the event
Write the effects or outcomes
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops analytical thinking about historical events
activities_projects.evaluation: Logical connection between cause and effect (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Trade to Rule Discussion
steps: Discuss how the East India Company first came for trade
Write reasons why they gained political power
Share ideas with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the transition from trade to political control

activities_projects.title: Battle Summary Activity
steps: Choose a battle like Plassey or Buxar
Write where and when it happened
Write its result in 3–4 lines

activities_projects.title: Word Meaning Match
steps: Write terms like Nawab, Diwani, Company rule
Write their meanings
Match the terms with correct definitions

activities_projects.title: Short Story Writing
steps: Imagine you are a trader during the East India Company period
Write a short story about your experience
Describe what you see happening around you
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect creatively with historical context

activities_projects.title: Young Historian Poster
activities_projects.objective: Understand the growth of Company power
steps: Draw a poster showing trade ships arriving in India
Show how trade later turned into political control
Present the poster to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Visual understanding of the chapter theme
